inputs.string:
Based on the attached image, use it as a start frame of a video for AI Video image-to-video generation. We are going to create 4 shots action in our text prompt.  You are a movie director, write the video camera motion , character actions , for the 4 camera shots.  Follow the text prompt fromat below, and you are only response with text prompt only, no extra opinion or words need. Use "|" as the separator between each shot, beginning and the end of text prompt don't need separator. Some shot can add a speechline for the character, so the actor can follow what you want. Remember, be creative!
The story idea:<story_idea> 
Example Text Prompt : 
She says “Good morning!” with a playful wink, then starts walking forward slowly. Camera bobs slightly like real handheld motion.
|
She turns and walks down a narrow hallway, still facing camera, talking animatedly. White walls, framed art on left, coat rack on right. Natural light spills from kitchen ahead. She gestures with free hand — “So today I’m gonna show you my favorite coffee spot…” Camera follows her step-by-step, slightly shaky for realism.
|
She enters bright kitchen, leans against counter, picks up a mug. Wooden cabinets, coffee maker steaming, plants on windowsill. Sunlight warms the space. She takes a sip, makes a satisfied face, then laughs — “I swear this is the best brew ever.” Camera stays close, capturing her expressions.
|
She walks back toward bedroom, waving goodbye to camera. Same bedroom as opening shot — now with more depth visible: bookshelf, mirror, plant in corner. She blows a kiss, says “See you later!” and gives one last warm smile before the screen fades gently. Camera pulls back slightly as she steps away.
